validate: .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_slug_util.py -q && grep -q _slug_util scripts/build_event_shells.py && grep -q _slug_util scripts/build_rss_feed.py

validate: .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_config_buttondown.py -q && grep -q buttondown_endpoint config/master_config.yaml

title: Add distribution.buttondown_endpoint to master_config

validate: .venv/bin/python scripts/build_config_json.py && .venv/bin/python -c "import json; c=json.load(open('docs/config.json')); assert 'buttondown_endpoint' in c and 'site_base_url' in c"

title: Emit docs/config.json from master_config

title: Refactor share menu to 9 platforms + reuse for digest

validate: grep -qE 'one_liner' docs/script.js && grep -qE 'shareText.*one_liner|one_liner.*shareText' docs/script.js
accept: Share text uses event one_liner when present, falls back to title
title: Pre-craft share text from one-liner hook

validate: .venv/bin/python -c "import re; css=open('docs/styles.css').read(); assert re.search(r'\.share-popover', css) and re.search(r'@media', css)"

validate: grep -q CC_CONFIG docs/script.js && grep -q config.json docs/script.js

validate: grep -q signup-form docs/index.html && grep -q cc_subscribe_email docs/script.js
accept: Index has signup form; script fires cc_subscribe_email Plausible event on submit; endpoint from CC_CONFIG with stub fallback
title: Masthead Buttondown signup form with stub fallback

validate: test -f docs/subscribed.html && test -f docs/unsubscribed.html && grep -q masthead docs/subscribed.html && grep -q masthead docs/unsubscribed.html

title: Subscribed and unsubscribed landing pages

validate: .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_build_archive.py -q && .venv/bin/python scripts/build_archive.py && test -f docs/archive.html && grep -q weekly/ docs/archive.html

validate: grep -q signup-form scripts/build_weekly_digest.py

validate: grep -qi 'mailing list' docs/ABOUT.md

validate: .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_build_llms_txt.py -q && .venv/bin/python scripts/build_llms_txt.py && test -f docs/llms.txt && test -f docs/llms-full.txt && grep -q 'Culture Calendar' docs/llms.txt

validate: .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_build_api_json.py -q && .venv/bin/python scripts/build_api_json.py && .venv/bin/python -c "import json; [json.load(open('docs/api/'+f)) for f in ['events.json','top-picks.json','venues.json','people.json','categories.json']]"

validate: .venv/bin/python scripts/build_ai_agent_manifest.py && test -f docs/.well-known/ai-agent.json && .venv/bin/python -c "import json; m=json.load(open('docs/.well-known/ai-agent.json')); assert len(m.get('endpoints',[]))>=5"

validate: grep -q 'rel="canonical"' scripts/build_venue_pages.py && grep -q 'rel="canonical"' scripts/build_people_pages.py && grep -q 'rel="canonical"' scripts/build_weekly_digest.py && grep -q 'meta name="description"' scripts/build_venue_pages.py && grep -q 'meta name="description"' scripts/build_weekly_digest.py

validate: grep -qE 'rel="(prev|next)"' scripts/build_weekly_digest.py
